videos.title: How An Infinite Hotel Ran Out Of Room
videos.author: Veritasium
videos.description:
If there's a hotel with infinite rooms, could it ever be completely full? 

Could you run out of space to put everyone? 

The surprising answer is yes -- this is important to know if you're the manager of the Hilbert Hotel.

videos.title: Can you solve the hat riddle?
videos.author: Veritasium
videos.description:
You and 3 amigos are buried neck deep in sand in a prison yard.

The guard says if one of you can guess your own hat colour you can all go free. You know there are two black hats and two white hats and you can only see the hats of the people in front of you.

videos.title: How Alpha Particles Can Break Computer Chips
videos.author: Veritasium
videos.description:
In the 1970s, Intel couldn't work out what was damaging the DRAM on their microchips.

The cause turned out to be the ceramic that the chip was encased in. It was secretly flipping 1s to 0s.

But how?
